name: clodex
description: Autonomous development loop: plan, ship, run codex adversarial-review, and iterate on findings until approved or threshold/iteration cap is reached. v0.2.8 adds automated broker wedge detection + recovery (pre-flight: detect stale running jobs in the codex-companion broker and kill the broker PID so the next call spawns a fresh runtime; mid-iteration: on stall, retry once after a broker kill before escalating to codex-reproducible-hang). Paired with HARD_RULES.md v0.2.6 which carves out the sanctioned broker-kill exception under Rule 2. v0.2.7 added iter-NNN-stalled.md breadcrumbs and sharper stall detection (~3-min frozen-window). v0.2.6 added per-iteration iter-NNN-review.md (human-readable rendering of codex.json). v0.2.5 externalized hard rules to HARD_RULES.md. v0.2.4 normalized .clodex/ disk layout. v0.2.3 forced help/version through Bash for VS Code extension paraphrase-resistance. v0.2.2 added --version flag. v0.2.1 adapted to codex plugin v1.0.4's disable-model-invocation by invoking codex-companion.mjs directly. v0.2 baseline: hard rules, --continue flag, outage-aware retry, 3-failure-mode cap.
